cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota With Your Partner
cards.body: One couple solved constant bickering over household duties by implementing a simple parenting rota system. This life-changing approach eliminated arguments about who does more and brought clarity to their responsibilities.

cards.title: Handling In-Laws' Behavior Before Having Children
cards.body: If your partner's parent displays cruelty, it's wise to minimize their contact with future children unless they fundamentally change. Setting boundaries early protects your kids from harmful relationships.

cards.title: Bibliotherapy Helps Grieving Children Process Loss
cards.body: Fictional characters in books can help children navigate the death of a parent and process complex emotions. This therapeutic approach provides comfort during difficult grief journeys.

cards.title: Protecting Young Athletes From Identity Burnout
cards.body: Many young people struggle when their sports careers end because they've built their entire identity around athletics. Helping athletes discover meaning beyond sports prevents devastating crashes.

cards.title: Understanding Parental Narcissism's Effect on Identity
cards.body: Narcissistic abuse from parents interrupts the crucial process of developing your own sense of self. Recovery involves reclaiming who you truly are beneath the damage.

cards.title: How Emotionally Neglectful Parents Impact Development
cards.body: Recognizing what emotionally neglectful parents failed to provide can be transformative for healing. The real question isn't whether to confront them, but how to protect yourself going forward.

cards.title: Recognizing Sensitivity in Teenagers Isn't Immaturity
cards.body: Being sensitive to graphic content doesn't mean you're immature—maturity has nothing to do with forcing yourself to watch things you don't want to. Curiosity about why you feel differently from peers matters more.

cards.title: Coercive Control Targets Young People
cards.body: Cults and human traffickers use coercive control tactics to recruit and retain young people. Learning how to help the youth in your life recognize these warning signs is crucial.
